# Vendored libraries

Third-party libraries are vendored here (no CDN tags, no bundler) to keep the
frontend build-free and offline-friendly.

| File | Library | Version | License |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `gsap.min.js` | [GSAP](https://gsap.com) | 3.12.5 | [GSAP Standard License](https://gsap.com/standard-license) (free to use; not MIT) |
| `marked.min.js` | [marked](https://github.com/markedjs/marked) | 13.0.3 | MIT |

When upgrading, replace the file and update this table.
